blended.narrative: Troll Resort is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,230 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.3" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
